prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `48634b99`.
codex_response:
Implemented the new ARC2 task package for `48634b99` in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_48634b99/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_48634b99/verifier.py), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_48634b99/generator.py).

The rule is: find the only mixed vertical bar whose cells are split into one contiguous `9` half and one contiguous `8` half, turn that source bar back to all `8`, then mark the corresponding top or bottom half of the unique pure `8` bar that is longer by 2 cells. The `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint matched the official examples closely enough to use; `arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` had no entry, so no `notes.md` was needed.

The generator matches the task family by building fixed `16x16` grids with background `7`, one mixed source bar, the same ladder of pure even-length vertical bars, and several disconnected 2-cell noise bars. No new primitive was added.

Validation passed end to end:
- Official examples: `4/4` passed.
- Generated examples: `1000/1000` passed.
- Artifacts produced at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/48634b99/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/48634b99/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/48634b99/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/48634b99/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/48634b99/previews/preview_03.png).
